title: Annual Sports Day 2024
content: The Annual Sports Day will be held on 20th December 2024. All students are requested to participate enthusiastically. Events include 100m race, long jump, relay race, and more.

title: Winter Vacation Notice
content: School will remain closed for Winter Vacation from 25th December 2024 to 1st January 2025. Classes will resume on 2nd January 2025.

title: Fee Payment Reminder
content: This is a reminder to all parents that the December fee is due by 10th December 2024. Please pay via online portal or visit the fee counter.

title: Half Yearly Results Published
content: Half Yearly examination results have been published. Students can view their results in the portal. Report cards will be distributed on 15th December 2024.
